Home›Amenities
FACILITIES

Every Luxury.
Every Comfort.

We've thought of everything so you don't have to. Move in and feel completely at home from day one.

What We Offer

Every Luxury. Every Comfort.

Every bedroom is fully furnished and private. The hall and kitchen are shared, well-maintained common areas — stocked and ready so you can move in and feel at home from day one.

🥐

Free Breakfast

Complimentary morning breakfast for all guests. Other meals are available on a paid basis.

🛜

High-Speed Wi-Fi

Blazing fast internet for work calls, streaming, and daily use — always reliable.

❄️

Air Conditioning

Individual AC units in every private bedroom for perfect personal comfort.

📺

Smart TV

Premium Smart TV in the shared hall — Netflix, Prime, and all OTT platforms.

🍳

Fully Equipped Kitchen

Shared kitchen with gas stove, utensils, and all appliances needed to cook your own meals.

👕

Washing Machine

In-unit washing machine available for all guests sharing the apartment.

🔒

24/7 Security

CCTV surveillance and gated entry throughout the premises for your safety.

🚗

Parking Space

Dedicated parking for two-wheelers and four-wheelers available on premises.

🛏️

Premium Bedding

Every bedroom has a quality mattress, pillows, and fresh linen — hotel-grade comfort.

⚡

Power Backup

Uninterrupted power supply ensures zero disruption to your stay.

🧹

Regular Housekeeping

Common areas and rooms kept clean and tidy with scheduled housekeeping service.

🏠

Shared Common Hall

Spacious, furnished living hall shared comfortably between all guests in the apartment.

📞

Direct Owner Support

Our founder is directly reachable 24/7 for any assistance, maintenance, or special requests.

Luxury service apartments crafted for those who expect more. Your home away from home in the heart of Oragadam, Chennai.

Quick Book via WhatsApp
